blocks.text: Carlsen Opens His World Championship Bid — Tuesday Is Chess Day
Magnus Carlsen steps onto the biggest stage in chess as the FIDE Candidates Tournament begins Wednesday. But first, Tuesday is a day to breathe — one quiet ATP clay court match before the storm.
♟️ Carlsen's Candidates campaign launches — Round 1 of the FIDE Candidates Tournament 2026. The winner earns the right to challenge for the World Chess Championship.
🎾 Tiriac Open (ATP 250, Bucharest) — Early-round clay court action as the European clay swing builds toward Roland Garros.
🚴 Dwars door Vlaanderen — Wærenskjold races Wednesday's punchy Belgian warm-up ahead of Ronde van Vlaanderen. Norwegian honour on the cobbles.
